subcodes.first_line: O imploring leaf! In this span Sohrab hath fallen into the clutches of Afrasiyab, and in combat with the self doth burn and seethe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبتهله سهراب در این مدت بچنگ افراسیاب افتاده و بجنگ نفس در تب و تاب
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @service to others; to the Cause of God
